beforeEn: Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I got a job offer and want to negotiate but I'm nervous about it. Write me the actual email I should send with my counteroffer. Look up current salary benchmarks if that helps. Give me 2 email versions: one balanced, one slightly bolder. Show me you can nail this kind of professional communication.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. Everyone says "you eat 8 spiders a year in your sleep." I think it's fake but I want the real story. Look up where this actually came from, how it spread, and what's actually true about spiders and sleeping humans. Make this a satisfying deep-dive that answers the question completely. Show me you're good at research.
System info (app version, OS), MCP connector status, VM info, and recent Cowork service logs. Logs are scrubbed for known secret/token patterns before upload.
Build a secure Node.js REST API

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I have a meeting next week with a Fortune 500 company that could be our biggest deal. Create a one-page meeting prep doc as an artifact: research plan, top 6 discovery questions, positioning strategy. Look up current trends in enterprise buying if that helps. Make it something I can review the night before and feel prepared.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I want to play 5 songs at a campfire in 3 months, never played an instrument, 30-45 min/day practice. Create a learning plan as an artifact with Weeks 1-4 detailed: what to practice each week, first 2 songs to learn, daily practice structure. Then outline Weeks 5-12. Make this specific enough to start today. Show me you can create an actual learning plan.
5. You can interact with Claude about the meeting content

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. The Krebs cycle explanation in my textbook lost me completely. Explain it using one compelling analogy that makes every step memorable and shows why it matters. Then tell me what to memorize vs. understand for my exam. Make this the explanation that finally works - clear, memorable, not overwhelming.
2. Claude will join the meeting as a participant
Pay-as-you-go at API rates, billed monthly

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. My design handoffs cause constant back-and-forth with developers. Create a component documentation template as an artifact and show me 2 filled examples - one simple component, one complex. Make the examples good enough that my team can use them as the standard. Show me what good documentation actually looks like.
Add Claude to another meeting for {projectName}. The transcript will be added to this project.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I'm confused about neural networks, decision trees, and linear regression. Explain each one with a single great analogy that makes it click, then show me the key differences in a comparison table or visual format. Create this as an artifact if that helps. Make this the clearest explanation I've seen - that's what would impress me.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I need to learn Docker from zero in 2 weeks. Create a Week 1 learning plan as an artifact - show me exactly what to do Days 1-7 with hands-on exercises and a real Dockerfile I can use. Make it actionable and clear. I want to see you organize complex information into something I can actually follow.
3. A new project will be created for the meeting
Faster responses, higher cost. Opus 4.6 and 4.7 only.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I have three major exams in 2 weeks (calculus, organic chemistry, history) and I'm overwhelmed. Create a 2-week study calendar as an artifact I can print and follow. Day-by-day schedule with specific tasks, realistic time blocks, and built-in buffer. Make it feel doable. Show me you can take complexity and make it manageable.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I'm presenting a redesign to stakeholders who focus on preferences over user needs. Give me the presentation structure and 5 specific phrases for redirecting subjective feedback professionally. Then write me an executive summary I can send before the meeting as an artifact. Make this practical and ready to use.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. We can land Mars rovers but don't fully understand how anesthesia works. Explain what we DO know, the competing theories, and why this is so hard to figure out. Check recent research if that helps. Make this clear and fascinating - show me you can make complex scientific mysteries accessible without dumbing them down.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I need to tell a client we're missing their deadline by two weeks due to technical issues. Just write me the email - honest, accountable, maintains the relationship. Then give me one alternate version that's slightly warmer. Show me you can nail the tone on something delicate like this. I don't need a framework right now, I need the actual email.
Claude is attempting to join the meeting. This may take a moment...

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I want to get stronger - bad knee, 20-30 min, 4x/week, resistance bands and dumbbells only. Create a 4-week workout program as an artifact with Week 1's exact workouts (4 days with exercises, sets, reps, warm-up). Then show how Weeks 2-4 progress. Format this so I can print it and just follow along. Show me you can create an actual program I can use.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. My content is too consumption-focused - help me brainstorm 10 video ideas about experiences, perspectives, or real value instead. Check what's trending in content right now if it helps. Organize these in a scannable artifact with brief explanations. Then pick the top 3 and give me hooks/outlines. Make this actionable and creative.
A fixed seat fee you commit to, plus usage billed monthly at API rates — you only pay for what your team uses.
Removing this plugin will delete all of its commands and skills. You can reinstall it from the marketplace later.
Fast mode is only available on Opus 4.6 and 4.7

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. What if the Library of Alexandria never burned? Don't just say "we'd be more advanced" - get specific about what knowledge we lost, which discoveries would have happened centuries earlier, and how our technology timeline might look different. Look up what we actually know about what was in the library. Name actual lost texts and their impact. Make this fascinating and concrete.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I have 15 feature requests and limited resources. Build me a prioritization framework as a spreadsheet artifact. Include scoring criteria, examples of how to score, and decision rules. Make it something I can use in tomorrow's meeting. Show me you can create actual tools, not just advice.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. Explain entropy and the second law of thermodynamics as a noir detective story set in 1940s LA. Make it scientifically accurate but genuinely entertaining - full commitment to noir style. Write the actual story as an artifact, don't describe how you'd write it. Show me you can do something creative and unexpected while teaching real physics.
THIS IS A DEMO FEATURE. DO NOT SHARE SENSITIVE ANTHROPIC DATA OR CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I'm designing a dashboard for financial advisors monitoring 50+ client portfolios. Give me your core UX recommendation - layout structure, information hierarchy, 3-4 key interaction patterns. Look up what successful financial tools do if that helps. Include a simple wireframe or clear visual description as an artifact. Make this strategic and specific.
We use your shipping address for tax calculation. If it isn’t available, we’ll use your billing address instead.
4. Claude will transcribe and process the conversation in real-time

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I have 5 days off in March from Seattle, $1,500 budget, hate crowds, want food/nature/culture. Pick one destination and give me a day-by-day itinerary as an artifact with specific restaurants, activities, where to stay. Look up current prices and conditions for March. Include a budget breakdown. Make this detailed enough that I can just book it and go.
Update Claude Desktop to enable fast mode for Opus 4.7
Note: Make sure you have permission to record the meeting. Claude will appear as a participant named ‘Claude Assistant’ in the call.
Google Meet URL of the form https://meet.google.com/abc-defg-hij
Show the Code tab (terminal-based coding sessions). Sessions run on the host, not inside the VM.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I just started a role as the youngest person on my team by 10+ years. Give me a 30-60-90 day strategy as an artifact: how to share ideas, ask questions, build relationships. Include 4-5 specific phrases that work and 3 scenarios with how to handle them. Make this practical and confidence-building.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I'm dealing with unnecessary re-renders in my React component causing performance issues. Create a diagnostic guide as an artifact I can reference. Include the top 3 causes with before/after code examples. Make it visual, scannable, and immediately useful. Less explanation, more solutions I can implement.
Enter the distorted text exactly as shown in the image
Optional: Give your meeting project a custom name

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I'm building a REST API in Node.js for a startup. Give me the 5 most critical security and performance patterns with actual code I can use today. Create this as a code artifact or reference doc - something I'd want to bookmark. Check what the current best practices are if needed. Make it sharp, practical, and production-ready.
Turn data into an executive story
Failed to update GitHub trigger. You can try again.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. Cold plunge therapy claims to boost immunity, metabolism, and mental health. Look up recent research and evaluate each claim - what does actual evidence say? Distinguish what's well-supported from what's overstated. Give me a realistic bottom-line assessment. Show me you can cut through wellness marketing to real evidence.
Add Claude to your video calls. Claude will join the meeting, transcribe the conversation, and help you with notes, action items, and follow-ups.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I don't know my "dream job." Ask me 6-8 reflection questions about what energizes me, ideal work environment, what I want my days to look like. Then based on patterns, suggest 4 career directions with what they actually involve and first steps to explore. Look up what these roles typically pay and require if that helps. Make this feel like a conversation that leads somewhere real.
Analyze data, build presentations, and draft documents with Claude alongside you.
Domains Cowork's tools may reach during a turn. Also surfaced under Egress Requirements.
Google requires verification before the bot can join the meeting. Enter the text shown in the image below.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. My user stories are too vague and confuse developers. Show me the template, then give me 3 solid examples covering different scenarios. Create this as an artifact I can share with my team. Make these examples good enough that I can pattern-match from them. I want to see what "good" looks like.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I heard there's a whole community collecting vintage mechanical calculators. Look into this and explain: what these are, why people care about them, the most prized models, how the community works, and what makes this interesting beyond "old stuff." Make me understand the appeal. Show me you can make niche topics fascinating.

Hey Claude! This is my first time using you and I'm just trying to get a sense of what you can do. I have sales data: 40% growth in Midwest, 15% decline on coasts. Turn this into a tight executive presentation as an artifact - opening hook, 3 hypotheses for why (look up relevant economic or market trends if that helps), key recommendations. Create this as presentation slides or a structured outline I can use Friday. Show me you can take raw data and craft a compelling story.
{count, plural, one {# person from your domain is already using Claude.} other {# people from your domain are already using Claude.}}
This is a demo feature only. Do not share any sensitive Anthropic data, confidential information, or proprietary materials in meetings with this bot.

afterEn: Change location for Cowork files?
afterJa: Cowork ファイルの保存先を変更しますか？

afterEn: Inference configuration
afterJa: 推論設定

afterEn: Choose a folder outside the current Claude folder.
afterJa: 現在の Claude フォルダーの外にあるフォルダーを選択してください。

afterEn: Copy and restart
afterJa: コピーして再起動

afterEn: What do you want automated?
afterJa: 何を自動化しますか？

afterEn: The file couldn't be read. Try again.
afterJa: ファイルを読み込めませんでした。もう一度お試しください。

afterEn: Issuer URLs the OAuth sign-in may use, as a JSON array. Pre-filled by presets; ask your IdP admin if unsure.
afterJa: OAuthサインインで使用される発行者URLをJSON配列形式で指定します。プリセットによって自動入力されます。不明な場合はIdP管理者にお問い合わせください。

afterEn: Loading older messages
afterJa: 以前のメッセージを読み込み中

afterEn: Max 5x monthly
afterJa: Max 5x（月間）

afterEn: Your admin set {model} as the default
afterJa: 管理者が{model}をデフォルトに設定しました。

afterEn: `/rename` renames the current session
afterJa: `/rename` で現在のセッション名を変更できます

afterEn: Add MCP servers, set a model allowlist, or change providers any time in the Inference configuration menu.
afterJa: 推論設定メニューでいつでも MCP サーバーの追加、モデルの許可リストの設定、またはプロバイダーの変更ができます。

afterEn: That connector is already installed.
afterJa: そのコネクタはすでにインストールされています。

afterEn: Something went wrong. Try again.
afterJa: エラーが発生しました。もう一度お試しください。

afterEn: Your certificate couldn't be uploaded. Try again.
afterJa: 証明書をアップロードできませんでした。もう一度お試しください。

afterEn: You're using {provider}
afterJa: {provider}を使用しています

afterEn: Changes apply only to this task. New tasks start on {model}.
afterJa: 変更はこのタスクにのみ適用されます。新しいタスクは{model}で開始されます。

afterEn: Draft routine
afterJa: ルーティンを作成

afterEn: Some plugins couldn't load
afterJa: 一部のプラグインを読み込めませんでした

afterEn: Compacted conversation · saved {tokens} tokens
afterJa: 圧縮された会話・{tokens}トークンを節約

afterEn: Certificate removed.
afterJa: 証明書を削除しました。

afterEn: You already have a certificate under review.
afterJa: すでに審査中の証明書があります。

afterEn: Required when a client secret is configured. For mcp.box.com use ["https://api.box.com"].
afterJa: クライアントシークレットが設定されている場合は必須です。mcp.box.comの場合は["https://api.box.com"]を使用してください。

afterEn: Your feedback, diagnostic logs, and task transcript will be used to improve Cowork.
afterJa: お客様のフィードバック、診断ログ、およびタスクのトランスクリプトは、Cowork の改善のために使用されます。

afterEn: Update Claude Desktop to enable fast mode for this model
afterJa: このモデルの高速モードを有効にするには Claude Desktop を更新してください

afterEn: Microsoft 365
afterJa: Microsoft 365

afterEn: Split view now tiles into an adaptive grid — fit more sessions on a wide screen
afterJa: 分割ビューがアダプティブグリッドに並ぶようになりました — ワイドスクリーンでより多くのセッションを表示できます

afterEn: Client secret helper script
afterJa: クライアントシークレットヘルパースクリプト

afterEn: Changes apply only to this conversation. New conversations start on {model}.
afterJa: 変更はこの会話にのみ適用されます。新しい会話は{model}で開始されます。

afterEn: {product} grant
afterJa: {product} 付与

afterEn: No scan runs to show in this project.
afterJa: このプロジェクトに表示するスキャン実行がありません。

afterEn: {isExpired, select, true {Expired} other {Expires}} {date}.
afterJa: {isExpired, select, true {有効期限切れ} other {有効期限}}: {date}。

afterEn: Compacted conversation
afterJa: 圧縮された会話

afterEn: The file is larger than 10MB. Choose a smaller file.
afterJa: ファイルが10MBを超えています。より小さいファイルを選択してください。

afterEn: Enable the Code tab. Claude writes and runs code.
afterJa: コードタブを有効にします。Claudeがコードを記述・実行します。

afterEn: Save {pct}%
afterJa: {pct}% 節約

afterEn: Queued messages collapse into a stack — click to expand
afterJa: キューに入ったメッセージがスタックに折りたたまれます — クリックして展開

afterEn: Allow code execution in Chat
afterJa: Chatでのコード実行を許可する

afterEn: Allow Claude to run code in a local sandbox in Chat conversations. The sandbox can read only the files attached to the conversation and has no network access.
afterJa: Claudeがチャット会話内のローカルサンドボックスでコードを実行できるようにします。サンドボックスは会話に添付されたファイルのみ読み取ることができ、ネットワークアクセスはありません。

afterEn: `/compact` now shows a marker in the transcript where context was compacted
afterJa: `/compact` がコンテキストを圧縮した箇所にトランスクリプト内でマーカーを表示するようになりました

afterEn: Only for IdPs whose token endpoint requires a client secret (e.g. Box). Leave blank for PKCE-only public clients.
afterJa: トークンエンドポイントにクライアントシークレットが必要なIdP（例：Box）のみ対象です。PKCEのみを使用するパブリッククライアントの場合は空白のままにしてください。

afterEn: Your artifacts and scheduled tasks are stored at {path}.
afterJa: アーティファクトとスケジュールされたタスクは {path} に保存されています。

afterEn: Get a desktop notification when a routine run fails
afterJa: ルーティン実行が失敗したときにデスクトップ通知を受け取る

afterEn: Grants ability to read an organization's effective settings
afterJa: 組織の有効な設定を読み取る権限を付与します

afterEn: Certificate
afterJa: 証明書

afterEn: Your GitHub organization's IP allowlist is blocking Claude from reaching this repository, so it can't be scanned. Click to recheck.
afterJa: GitHubのIP許可リストがClaudeのアクセスをブロックしているため、このリポジトリをスキャンできません。クリックして再確認してください。

afterEn: Your billing address is used for tax calculation.
afterJa: 請求先住所は税額計算に使用されます。

afterEn: App diagnostics (version, OS, hardware, network), MCP connector status, VM info, and recent app logs. Logs are scrubbed for known secret and token patterns before upload, but may contain incidental personal data.
afterJa: アプリの診断情報（バージョン、OS、ハードウェア、ネットワーク）、MCP コネクターのステータス、VM 情報、および最近のアプリログ。ログはアップロード前に既知のシークレットおよびトークンパターンが除去処理されますが、意図せず個人データが含まれる場合があります。

afterEn: Org default
afterJa: 組織のデフォルト

afterEn: Couldn’t copy your Cowork data to the new location. See logs for details.
afterJa: Cowork データを新しい場所にコピーできませんでした。詳細はログを確認してください。

afterEn: Higher effort is more thorough, but takes longer and consumes usage limits faster.
afterJa: 高い努力レベルはより徹底的ですが、時間がかかり、使用制限をより速く消費します。

afterEn: Scan archived
afterJa: スキャンがアーカイブされました

afterEn: New task draft
afterJa: 新規タスクの下書き

afterEn: Kick off another task
afterJa: 別のタスクを開始する

afterEn: Network folders (UNC paths) can’t be used for your Cowork data. Choose a folder on this device.
afterJa: ネットワーク フォルダー（UNC パス）は Cowork データに使用できません。このデバイス上のフォルダーを選択してください。

afterEn: Couldn’t save the folder setting. Try again.
afterJa: フォルダーの設定を保存できませんでした。もう一度お試しください。

afterEn: Upload a certificate
afterJa: 証明書をアップロード

afterEn: One certificate is already under review. You can upload another once review is complete.
afterJa: 1件の証明書がすでに審査中です。審査が完了したら、別の証明書をアップロードできます。

afterEn: ["https://api.box.com"]
afterJa: ["https://api.box.com"]

afterEn: Enable the Chat tab. Quick questions and drafting.
afterJa: チャットタブを有効にします。簡単な質問や下書き作成に使用します。

afterEn: Remote Control shows as a badge in the title bar — click it to turn on or off
afterJa: リモートコントロールがタイトルバーにバッジとして表示されます — クリックしてオン/オフを切り替えられます

afterEn: The certificate was rejected: {reason}
afterJa: 証明書が却下されました: {reason}

afterEn: Your certificate couldn't be processed right now. Try again in a few minutes.
afterJa: 現在、証明書を処理できません。数分後にもう一度お試しください。

afterEn: Drafting…
afterJa: 作成中…

afterEn: Uploaded {date}.
afterJa: {date}にアップロードされました。

afterEn: Cancelling a queued message no longer interrupts the turn in progress
afterJa: キューに入ったメッセージをキャンセルしても、進行中のターンが中断されなくなりました

afterEn: Analyze data, build presentations, draft documents, and triage your inbox with Claude alongside you.
afterJa: Claudeと一緒に、データの分析、プレゼンテーションの作成、ドキュメントの下書き、受信トレイの整理ができます。

afterJa: 税額免除

afterJa: Coworkタブを許可する

afterEn: Bash commands in the transcript are syntax-highlighted
afterJa: トランスクリプト内の Bash コマンドがシンタックスハイライトされます

afterEn: Without code execution, Claude can't analyze spreadsheets or other files that require computation in Chat.
afterJa: コードの実行なしでは、Claudeはチャットでスプレッドシートや計算が必要なその他のファイルを分析できません。

afterJa: スキャンのアーカイブに失敗しました。もう一度お試しください。

afterJa: GitHubのこのリポジトリへのアクセス権がないため、スキャンできません。クリックして再確認してください。

afterJa: 週次 · {product}

afterEn: Startups
afterJa: スタートアップ

afterJa: メモリの問題

afterEn: Claude for Microsoft 365
afterJa: Claude for Microsoft 365

afterEn: Allowed surfaces
afterJa: 許可されたサーフェス

afterEn: Your most recent sessions open faster from the sidebar
afterJa: 最近のセッションがサイドバーからより速く開けるようになりました

afterEn: Summarize my open PRs every weekday morning
afterJa: 毎週平日の朝、オープン中のPRを要約する

afterJa: 企業規模

afterEn: Covers {jurisdictions}.
afterJa: {jurisdictions}が対象です。

afterJa: マーケットプレイスの同期に失敗しました。

afterJa: チャットの制限

afterJa: 証明書が却下されました。正しいファイルであることを確認して、もう一度お試しください。

afterJa: 削除の確認

afterJa: Cowork ファイル

afterJa: 毎朝、新しいissueをトリアージして重複にフラグを立てる

afterEn: Checking for updates
afterJa: アップデートを確認しています

afterEn: Agents are only available in Cowork and Code.
afterJa: エージェントは Cowork と Code でのみ使用できます。

afterEn: Faster responses, higher cost. Opus only.
afterJa: 応答が速くなりますが、コストが高くなります。Opus のみ。

afterEn: Enable the Cowork tab. Claude works on longer tasks like research, analysis, and documents.
afterJa: Coworkタブを有効にします。Claudeがリサーチ、分析、ドキュメント作成などの長期タスクに取り組みます。

afterJa: ロールを割り当てる

afterEn: Use recommended
afterJa: 推奨を使用

afterEn: General restrictions
afterJa: 一般的な制限

afterEn: No payment method on file
afterJa: お支払い方法が登録されていません

afterEn: Hostnames the agent's tools may reach from the Cowork and Code tabs. Also surfaced under Egress Requirements.
afterJa: CoworkタブおよびCodeタブからエージェントのツールがアクセスできるホスト名です。エグレス要件にも表示されます。

afterEn: Max 20x monthly
afterJa: Max 20x（月間）

afterEn: The name on the certificate doesn't match your organization. It will be reviewed manually.
afterJa: 証明書の名前が組織名と一致しません。手動で審査されます。

afterJa: ツールのエグレス（CoworkタスクおよびCodeセッション）

afterEn: Play Microsoft 365 video
afterJa: Microsoft 365の動画を再生する

afterEn: Click an image path in a response to preview it, even when it's outside your project folder
afterJa: プロジェクトフォルダの外にある場合でも、レスポンス内の画像パスをクリックしてプレビューできます

afterEn: PDF, up to 10MB.
afterJa: PDF、最大10MB。

afterEn: Plugins from {names} failed to load.
afterJa: {names} のプラグインを読み込めませんでした。

afterEn: Edit message
afterJa: メッセージを編集

afterEn: Select a tax exemption certificate (PDF)
afterJa: 税額免除証明書を選択（PDF）

afterEn: These apply regardless of which surfaces are enabled.
afterJa: これらは、どのサーフェスが有効になっているかに関わらず適用されます。

afterEn: Trackpad scrolling works over code and diff blocks
afterJa: コードおよび diff ブロック上でトラックパッドのスクロールが機能します

afterEn: Choose file
afterJa: ファイルを選択

afterEn: Failed to load recommendations. Try refreshing the page.
afterJa: おすすめの読み込みに失敗しました。ページを更新してみてください。

afterEn: Compacted conversation · from {tokens} tokens
afterJa: 圧縮された会話・{tokens}トークンから

afterEn: Authorization server
afterJa: 認可サーバー

afterEn: Upload another certificate
afterJa: 別の証明書をアップロード

afterEn: Under review
afterJa: 審査中

afterEn: Allow Chat tab
afterJa: チャットタブを許可する

afterEn: Your certificate has been submitted. A review will be completed within 2 business days, and the exemption will apply to your account.
afterJa: 証明書が提出されました。2営業日以内に審査が完了し、免税がアカウントに適用されます。

afterEn: {schedule} (times in UTC)
afterJa: {schedule}（UTC時間）

afterEn: Executable that prints the client secret on stdout. Overrides the inline value.
afterJa: クライアントシークレットをstdoutに出力する実行ファイルです。インライン値を上書きします。

afterEn: Use saved card
afterJa: 保存済みカードを使用

afterEn: Sessions with uncommitted changes are no longer auto-archived
afterJa: 未コミットの変更があるセッションは自動アーカイブされなくなりました

afterEn: That folder can’t be used. Choose another.
afterJa: そのフォルダーは使用できません。別のフォルダーを選択してください。

afterEn: Nothing flagged for this period.
afterJa: この期間にフラグが立てられた項目はありません。

afterEn: Hooks are only available in Cowork and Code.
afterJa: フックはCoworkとCodeでのみ使用できます。

afterEn: Configure your plan
afterJa: プランを設定する

afterEn: The transcript stays where you scrolled instead of snapping back to the bottom
afterJa: トランスクリプトはスクロールした位置に留まり、一番下に自動スクロールされません

afterEn: A tax exemption certificate has expired. Upload a current certificate to continue your exemption.
afterJa: 免税証明書の有効期限が切れています。免税を継続するには、最新の証明書をアップロードしてください。

afterEn: Copy files to {location} and restart the app. Your existing files will remain in {previousLocation}.
afterJa: ファイルを {location} にコピーしてアプリを再起動します。既存のファイルは {previousLocation} に残ります。

afterEn: Your GitHub organization has an IP allowlist that is blocking Claude's servers from reaching this repository. Add <link>Claude's IP ranges</link> to your GitHub allowlist.
afterJa: GitHubのIP許可リストがClaudeのサーバーによるこのリポジトリへのアクセスをブロックしています。<link>ClaudeのIP範囲</link>をGitHubの許可リストに追加してください。

afterEn: You don't have access to this repository on GitHub. Ask a repository admin for access, or pick a different repository.
afterJa: GitHubのこのリポジトリへのアクセス権がありません。リポジトリの管理者にアクセス権を依頼するか、別のリポジトリを選択してください。

afterEn: The certificate couldn't be removed. Try again.
afterJa: 証明書を削除できませんでした。もう一度お試しください。

afterEn: Claude can’t write to that folder. Choose another.
afterJa: Claude はそのフォルダーに書き込めません。別のフォルダーを選択してください。

afterEn: Scan archived.
afterJa: スキャンをアーカイブしました。

afterEn: Moving out of the Documents folder can avoid file permission issues.
afterJa: ドキュメント フォルダーの外に移動すると、ファイルのアクセス許可の問題を回避できます。

afterEn: You've reached the upload limit. Try again later.
afterJa: アップロード上限に達しました。しばらくしてからもう一度お試しください。

afterEn: The file must be a PDF.
afterJa: ファイルはPDF形式である必要があります。

afterEn: Analyzing your certificate. This can take up to 30 seconds.
afterJa: 証明書を分析しています。最大30秒かかる場合があります。

afterEn: Tax exemptions aren't available for your billing region yet.
afterJa: お客様の請求先地域では、まだ税金免除をご利用いただけません。

afterEn: Fast mode is only available on Opus
afterJa: 高速モードはOpusでのみ使用できます

afterEn: Files you reference with `@` show as chips in the transcript, not just videos
afterJa: `@`で参照したファイルは、ビデオだけでなくトランスクリプトにチップとして表示されます

afterEn: Archive scan
afterJa: スキャンをアーカイブ

afterEn: Couldn't load model settings. Refresh to change this role's default.
afterJa: モデルの設定を読み込めませんでした。このロールのデフォルトを変更するには、更新してください。

afterEn: Draft release notes whenever a PR merges
afterJa: PRがマージされるたびにリリースノートを下書きする

afterEn: Close your running Cowork sessions first, then try again.
afterJa: 実行中の Cowork セッションを先に閉じてから、もう一度お試しください。
